PRODUCTION • APACHE HTTPD • KUBERNETES

Cloud-Native
Production Platform
on Kubernetes

A fully production-grade web application deployed with Apache HTTPD on Kubernetes — featuring zero-downtime rollouts, auto-scaling, secret management, and GitOps-ready manifests. Built for reliability at scale.

Downtime Events
Platform Capabilities

Everything You Need for Production

This deployment demonstrates enterprise patterns for running stateless web applications reliably in Kubernetes at any scale.

📦
Zero-Downtime Deployments
Rolling update strategy ensures new pods are ready before old ones are terminated. Max surge and max unavailable are tuned for continuous availability.
RollingUpdate maxSurge: 1 maxUnavailable: 0
🔑
Secret Management
Sensitive credentials are stored as Kubernetes Secrets and injected as environment variables at runtime — never baked into the container image.
Opaque Secrets RBAC Env Injection
❤️
Health Probes
Liveness and readiness probes guarantee only healthy pods receive traffic. Failed pods are automatically restarted by the kubelet without manual intervention.
livenessProbe readinessProbe httpGet
📏
Resource Governance
CPU and memory requests and limits prevent noisy-neighbour problems and enable the scheduler to pack workloads efficiently across nodes.
requests limits QoS: Burstable
📄
ConfigMap Injection
HTML content and application configuration live in a ConfigMap, mounted as a volume. Update content without rebuilding the image — just roll the pods.
ConfigMap volumeMount subPath
🛡️
Network Isolation
Each component runs in a dedicated namespace with a ClusterIP Service for internal routing and a LoadBalancer for controlled external ingress.
Namespace ClusterIP LoadBalancer
System Design

Request Flow Architecture

Every incoming request travels through Kubernetes networking layers before reaching the Apache HTTPD container serving your HTML content.

🌐
Internet
End User
→
☁️
LoadBalancer
Cloud LB / NodePort
→
🧰
Service
kube-proxy / iptables
→
📦
Pod (httpd)
Apache • port 80
→
📄
ConfigMap Vol
index.html mount
Technology Stack

Each technology was chosen for production reliability, community support, and seamless integration with the Kubernetes ecosystem.

🐳
Kubernetes
Orchestration
🌊
Apache HTTPD

📦
Docker
Container Runtime
📋
ConfigMap

🔑
Secrets
Credential Store

Prometheus

Observability

Runtime Metrics & Logs

Full visibility into every layer — from HTTP request counts to pod memory pressure — so on-call engineers can diagnose issues in seconds.

📊 Key Metrics
  • HTTP Request Rate 1,240 req/min
  • p95 Response Time 82 ms
  • Error Rate (5xx) 0.01%
  • Pod Restarts (24h) 0
  • Active Connections 347
  • Pending Pods 0
📝 Live Access Log
10:42:01 [OK] GET / 200 12ms httpd-0 10:42:03 [OK] GET / 200 9ms httpd-1 10:42:05 [INF] Readiness probe passed httpd-2 10:42:07 [OK] GET /health 200 2ms httpd-0 10:42:09 [WRN] HPA scaling check triggered 10:42:10 [OK] GET / 200 11ms httpd-2 10:42:12 [OK] GET / 200 8ms httpd-1 10:42:14 [INF] ConfigMap volume synced successfully
About

Why This Architecture?

This project serves as a practical reference for deploying production-grade static and server-rendered web applications on Kubernetes without exotic dependencies.

  • ✔ Immutable, image-based deployments with content injected via ConfigMap for easy hotfixes.
  • ✔ Secrets never touch the image layer — injected as env vars at pod startup time.
  • ✔ Resource requests and limits defined on every container to guarantee scheduling quality.
  • ✔ Liveness and readiness probes ensure automatic self-healing without operator intervention.
  • ✔ GitOps-ready YAML manifests — commit to trigger a pipeline, no imperative kubectl needed.
👩‍💻
Princy Rechal
DevOps & Cloud Engineer
Passionate about building resilient cloud-native platforms. Specialises in Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and developer experience tooling. Currently exploring GitOps patterns with ArgoCD and Flux.
Kubernetes Docker Terraform ArgoCD Prometheus Helm GitOps AWS / GCP

Ready to Deploy Your Own Platform?

All manifests are open-sourced and production-tested. Clone, customise, and deploy to your cluster in minutes.
